title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed via a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno & browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, RAG, voice).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with streaming, embeddings and tools support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing an ergonomic async client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement inside VS Code.

title: ollama-chat-app
summary: Minimal chat app example built with Next.js and the official ollama-js client.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client with markdown, history, and model switching.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ and streaming completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker images and compose examples (CPU & GPU) maintained by Ollama.

title: ollama-rag-qa
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama, Chroma and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models to your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that integrates Ollama models into channels with thread support.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping the Ollama HTTP API with Finch/Tesla and streaming.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing Ollama model endpoints and admin UI.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service that proxies and extends Ollama with OpenAI-compatible routes.
